SELECT
  (SELECT total_consumption/12.0 FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, c.total_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) c
     WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
     ORDER BY c.total_consumption ASC
     LIMIT 1
   )) -
  (SELECT total_consumption/12.0 FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, c.total_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) c
     WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
     ORDER BY c.total_consumption ASC
     LIMIT 1
   )) AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT total_consumption/12.0 FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, c.total_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) c
     WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
     ORDER BY c.total_consumption ASC
     LIMIT 1
   )) -
  (SELECT total_consumption/12.0 FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, c.total_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) c
     WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
     ORDER BY c.total_consumption ASC
     LIMIT 1
   )) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT total_consumption/12.0 FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, c.total_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) c
     WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM'
     ORDER BY c.total_consumption ASC
     LIMIT 1
   )) -
  (SELECT total_consumption/12.0 FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, c.total_consumption
     FROM (
       SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM customers c
       JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
       WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
       GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
     ) c
     WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
     ORDER BY c.total_consumption ASC
     LIMIT 1
   )) AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT Segment, pct FROM (
    WITH seg AS (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2012,
               SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2013
        FROM yearmonth ym
        JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment
    ),
    perc AS (
        SELECT Segment,
               (cons2013 - cons2012) / NULLIF(cons2012, 0) * 100.0 AS pct
        FROM seg
    )
    SELECT Segment, pct FROM perc WHERE pct = (SELECT MAX(pct) FROM perc)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Segment, pct FROM perc WHERE pct = (SELECT MIN(pct) FROM perc)
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH avg_salaries AS (
    SELECT account_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM trans
    GROUP BY account_id
),
oldest_female AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
    ORDER BY birth_date ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
client_accounts AS (
    SELECT d.account_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN oldest_female f ON d.client_id = f.client_id
),
min_avg AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS min_avg
    FROM avg_salaries
    WHERE account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM client_accounts)
),
max_avg AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg
    FROM avg_salaries
)
SELECT ca.account_id,
       (ma2.max_avg - ma.min_avg) AS gap
FROM client_accounts ca
JOIN avg_salaries asal ON ca.account_id = asal.account_id
JOIN min_avg ma ON asal.avg_salary = ma.min_avg
JOIN max_avg ma2 ON 1=1;	----- bird -----	financial
